meals.name: Herb-Crusted Boiled Egg with Sourdough & Raspberries
meals.image_prompt: boiled egg halves on rustic sourdough toast, fresh raspberries scattered beside, fresh dill and chives sprinkled on top, morning light, wooden plate
prep_steps: Boil 14 eggs (7 for week breakfast + boiled egg dinners), cool in ice bath, peel and store in fridge
day_of_steps: Place 1 boiled egg halves on plate
Toast 1 sourdough slice, arrange beside egg
Sprinkle dill and chives over egg
Serve 150g raspberries on the side

meals.name: Almonds & Pear
meals.image_prompt: handful of roasted almonds in a small bowl, fresh pear beside on white napkin, natural daylight
day_of_steps: Portion 30g almonds into small bowl
Slice 1 pear, arrange on small plate beside almonds

meals.name: Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Vegetables & Quinoa
meals.image_prompt: golden grilled chicken breast fanned on white plate, roasted red pepper strips and zucchini alongside, fluffy cooked quinoa in background, olive oil drizzle, lemon wedge, fresh herbs
prep_steps: Marinate 800g chicken breasts in lemon juice, garlic, olive oil and oregano (2–4 hours or overnight)
Roast 600g mixed veg (red peppers, zucchini, cherry tomatoes) at 200°C for 25 min
Cook 300g quinoa per package directions, cool and portion
day_of_steps: Grill marinated chicken 6–7 min per side until 165°C internal temp
Plate 180g grilled chicken per person
Add 150g roasted veg to plate
Spoon 100g cooked quinoa alongside veg
Drizzle 2 tsp olive oil, squeeze lemon juice over

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: creamy greek yogurt in glass bowl, scattered blueberries and walnut pieces on top, natural daylight from side
day_of_steps: Spoon 200g Greek yogurt into bowl
Top with 25g walnut pieces and 100g fresh blueberries

meals.name: Boiled Egg & Cheese Plate with Whole-Grain Pita & Avocado
meals.image_prompt: halved boiled egg on white plate, 30g gruyère cheese cubes beside, whole-grain pita bread folded, sliced avocado fanned, fresh baby spinach leaves underneath, cherry tomatoes, light and airy
day_of_steps: Place 2 boiled egg halves on plate
Add 30g gruyère cheese cubes
Warm 1 whole-grain pita 30 sec in toaster
Slice 60g avocado, arrange on pita or plate
Add 50g fresh baby spinach and 30g cherry tomatoes

meals.name: Herb-Crusted Boiled Egg with Sourdough & Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: boiled egg halves on rustic sourdough toast, fresh blueberries scattered beside, fresh dill and parsley, warm morning kitchen light, ceramic plate
day_of_steps: Place 1 boiled egg halves on plate

meals.name: Pan-Seared Salmon with Roasted Asparagus & Sweet Potato
meals.image_prompt: golden-pink salmon fillet skin-side up on white plate, roasted green asparagus spears alongside, golden roasted sweet potato wedges, lemon slice, dill garnish, olive oil shine
prep_steps: Roast 500g sweet potato wedges at 200°C for 20 min until tender
Blanch 400g asparagus 2 min, pat dry, toss with olive oil and garlic, roast 12 min at 200°C
day_of_steps: Pat 160g salmon fillet dry with paper towel
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in non-stick pan over medium-high heat
Pan-sear salmon skin-side up for 3–4 min, flip, cook 2–3 min until opaque
Plate salmon, asparagus, sweet potato wedges
Squeeze lemon juice, sprinkle fresh dill over salmon

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Almonds & Raspberries

meals.name: Mexican-Style Chicken Lettuce Wrap with Black Beans & Lime
meals.image_prompt: crisp romaine lettuce leaves holding tender seasoned shredded chicken, black beans visible, red bell pepper strips, cilantro and lime wedge on white plate, bright fresh colours
prep_steps: Shred 400g cooked chicken (reserved from batch) with 2 tsp cumin, 1 tsp paprika, garlic, lime juice
Warm 300g canned black beans (drained, rinsed) with cumin and lime juice in pot, cool
day_of_steps: Warm 130g shredded seasoned chicken in microwave 1 min
Warm 70g black bean mixture 1 min
Arrange 3 large romaine lettuce leaves on plate
Spoon chicken and beans into lettuce leaves
Top with 40g diced red pepper and fresh cilantro
Serve lime wedge on side

meals.name: Spiced Turkey Meatballs with Brown Lentil Salad & Roasted Beets
meals.image_prompt: three golden-brown turkey meatballs on white plate, served over warm brown lentil salad with diced roasted beets, rocket leaves, olive oil shine, lemon wedge
prep_steps: Mix 500g ground turkey, 30g breadcrumbs, 1 egg, 2 tsp cumin, 1 tsp paprika, garlic, salt & pepper
Shape into 16 balls, roast at 190°C for 18 min
Cook 250g brown lentils per package, cool
Roast 300g beets at 200°C for 20 min until tender, cool, dice
day_of_steps: Warm 3 turkey meatballs in microwave 2 min
Toss 60g cooked lentils with 50g diced roasted beets and 1 tsp olive oil, lemon juice
Plate meatballs on top of lentil-beet salad
Top with fresh rocket leaves (30g)

meals.name: Asian Tofu & Bok Choy Stir-Fry with Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: crispy-edged tofu cubes over bright green bok choy in wok, ginger-soy sauce glossy, sesame seeds on top, fluffy brown rice on the side, chopsticks, steam rising
prep_steps: Press 400g firm tofu, cut into 2cm cubes
Marinate in 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp sesame oil, grated ginger 30 min
day_of_steps: Cook 150g brown rice per package directions (fresh, takes ~30 min), keep warm
Heat 1.5 tsp sesame oil in wok over high heat
Pan-fry 150g tofu cubes until golden on all sides (8 min), set aside
Stir-fry 200g bok choy 3–4 min until tender-crisp
Return tofu, toss with 1 tbsp soy sauce and 1 tsp ginger
Plate rice, top with tofu and bok choy
Sprinkle sesame seeds (1 tsp)

meals.name: Grilled Beef Steak with Roasted Bell Peppers & Chickpea Purée
meals.image_prompt: medium-rare grilled beef steak fanned on white plate, roasted red and yellow bell pepper strips, creamy chickpea hummus dollop, fresh basil, olive oil drizzle
prep_steps: Marinate 500g sirloin steak in olive oil, garlic, rosemary (30 min–2 hours)
Roast 400g mixed bell peppers at 200°C for 20 min until soft
Blend 250g canned chickpeas with 2 tbsp tahini, lemon juice, garlic, water to smooth consistency
day_of_steps: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of red meat only keeps ~3 day(s), and this is day 4. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)
Grill marinated steak 4–5 min per side until medium-rare (internal 60°C)
Rest steak 2 min, slice into 160g portion
Plate steak, roasted peppers alongside
Spoon 50g chickpea purée on plate, drizzle with 1 tsp olive oil
Garnish with fresh basil
meals.safety_note: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of red meat only keeps ~3 day(s), and this is day 4. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)

prep_steps: Cook 150g quinoa per package directions, keep warm

Drizzle pan juices and fresh lemon over fish
